evidence_table.source: SELECT A."SEGMENTID" AS segment_id, A."NAME" AS segment_name, A."TOTALMEMBERS" AS total_profiles, A."CREATEDTIME" AS created_time, A."UPDATEDTIME" AS updated_time FROM "dim_segment" AS A JOIN "hkg_br_segment_target" AS AD ON A."SEGMENTID" = AD."SEGMENTID" JOIN "dim_target" AS D ON AD."TARGETID" = D."TARGETID" WHERE D."DATAFLOWNAME" = 'SMS Opt-In' OR D."NAME" = 'SMS Opt-In' ORDER BY A."NAME"
